productDisplayName: Undercolors of Benetton Men Racer White Innerwear Vest
description: In a sporty shape and masculine cuts, this Racer Vest from united colors of benetton makes for a perfect addition to your home wear wardrobe. The stretchable and absorbent soft cotton fabric with the stylish straps make it a great comfy buy. Wear it just like that or layer it under any outfit for unparalleled comfort. Made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane Round neck with thick grey piping along the neckline and straps Racer back for comfort Printed label for abrasion free comfort Wash care Machine wash delicate at 30 degrees Do not bleach or dry clean Flat dry in shade Cool iron if needed Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 35"
